title: 粗粮不是万能的！Cell期刊发表斯坦福团队研究：膳食纤维吃不对也能加重炎症 | 原文
content: A Stanford study in Cell found high-fiber diets may worsen inflammation in some people, differing from fermented foods. In a 10-week trial, healthy adults were split into groups; one consumed high-fiber foods like whole grains and legumes. The findings indicate dietary fiber is not universally beneficial and excessive intake can trigger negative inflammatory responses in certain individuals.

title: 设计了一套基于纯 md 的 agent 记忆方案，召回率还不错，安装也简单
content: This article describes a simple MD‑based memory system for agents. Each memory is a separate file under `data/`, with an `INDEX.md` listing titles, keywords, and summaries. The agent scans the index before tasks, then loads relevant files using its language model’s understanding—no database or embeddings needed. Advantages include zero dependencies, full transparency, easy migration, and local operation. Drawbacks are reliance on model comprehension and limited semantic matching. For up to a few hundred memories, the approach performs adequately with minimal cost.

title: 新华社官微发文《「耿同学」打假，值得深思的是什么？》，该事件还有哪些角度值得深思？
content: A Chinese science blogger exposed data fabrication in papers by multiple high-profile scholars from universities including Tongji, Nankai, and Sun Yat-sen. Tongji confirmed misconduct, firing the first author and removing the dean for negligence. The case highlights systemic failures in peer review and institutional oversight, as obvious anomalies were missed until exposed by an outsider. Experts call for systemic reforms, stronger data management, and better enforcement of research integrity policies rather than relying on individual whistleblowers.

title: 盒马“粉木耳”翻车：又一个失控的擦边营销
content: Hema recalled a pink wood ear mushroom product after consumers criticized its packaging for sexual innuendo. The incident exposed structural weaknesses in Hema's content review process for its expanding product lines. While provocative "borderline" marketing remains a low-cost tactic for generating social media traffic, regulatory and public tolerance has tightened. As a premium retailer, Hema faces severe reputational damage from such controversies. Sustainable brand building requires systematic content oversight and genuine product differentiation rather than risky suggestive messaging.

title: 前端初级岗位暴跌62%：我带了三年的实习生被裁了，而AI是他亲手教的
content: Junior frontend positions have declined 62% year-over-year as AI tools now handle entry-level coding tasks. Companies increasingly hire senior developers who use AI to replace multiple junior roles, raising industry entry barriers from basic coding to architecture and complex problem-solving. While demand for advanced frontend engineers remains strong with rising salaries, traditional junior growth paths are vanishing. The field is shifting toward AI engineering and automation roles, requiring developers to evolve beyond routine implementation work.

title: Browser-based file encryption tool using WebCrypto
content: A browser-based tool encrypts files locally using WebCrypto, eliminating server-side handling. Users select a file, choose a key or passphrase, and the tool applies secure cryptographic algorithms within the browser. The resulting encrypted file can be downloaded or shared, with decryption performed under the same client‑side logic. This approach provides privacy, reduces bandwidth use, and relies solely on JavaScript and the browser’s cryptographic APIs.

title: 华为提出韬（τ）定律：给它过低或过高的评价都有失偏颇
content: Huawei’s “τ‑law” proposes replacing geometric scaling with time‑constant reduction to improve transistor density and energy efficiency without advanced EUV lithography. It combines device, circuit, chip, and system optimizations—most notably logic folding—achieving 53.5 % density and 41 % energy gains in 7‑nm nodes. The framework, validated by 381 production chips over six years, aims to redefine mature processes as high‑performance and encourage global industry collaboration while shifting valuation from “nanometers” to system‑level performance metrics.

title: 3万、半年、注销：2026年，第一批“一人公司”老板已经退场
content: In 2026 the surge of “one‑person companies” (OPCs) largely fizzled. AI lowered entry barriers, but most solo founders failed to secure customers or sustain costs. Cases like Liao Ran, who spent 30 k CNY on inventory and salaries, and Guo Qi, who couldn’t translate artisanal skills into scalable products, illustrate the problem. Only 20 % of OPCs achieved a viable business loop. Survivors typically had industry experience or benefitted from subsidies and supportive hubs, while many others relied on misleading courses or empty shell companies.

title: 中国天才们正在排队“崩开源” | 原文
content: A Chinese article observes that while global open‑source communities have thrived on the principle of unconditional trust—developers freely sharing code and resources—the Chinese tech elite are now recognizing an untapped, unguarded resource in the internet. Amid widespread cost cutting and fierce competition, these talents see a vast, largely unused open‑source asset that could be leveraged for innovation and efficiency. The piece highlights this shift in awareness within China’s technology scene.

title: 微软按下 vibe coding 暂停键：烧 token 已经比员工贵了
content: Microsoft discontinued its internal Claude Code tool in June 2026 after a brief 2025 deployment that made it popular among engineers, PMs, and designers. The decision stemmed from escalating token costs that exceeded the productivity gains, exposing a structural problem: keeping existing salaries while adding variable AI expenses. While some start-ups view high token usage as a replacement for staff, Microsoft’s traditional model treated AI as a cost‑driven “co‑pilot” rather than a substitute, leading to its rollback.

title: 一年入账72.8亿，破产巨头“起死回生”
content: Kodak has revived its fortunes by licensing the iconic brand to fashion and lifestyle partners, mainly through Kodak Apparel in Korea. Since 2019, the brand‑licensing strategy has yielded high profits with near‑zero cost and inventory, contributing about 2% of revenue but $2 million in operating profit. The company now sells branded apparel, accessories and collaborations such as a recent “Hirono” tie‑in, reaching a younger audience while maintaining core printing and chemical businesses. This light‑asset model has helped Kodak escape bankruptcy and generate a second growth wave.

title: The Skeuomorphism Nobody Talks About [video]
content: The video “The Skeuomorphism Nobody Talks About” discusses the design principle of skeuomorphism—making digital interfaces resemble physical objects. It explains how this approach can improve usability by leveraging familiar real‑world cues, but also highlights its drawbacks: added visual clutter, unnecessary complexity, and future compatibility issues. The content examines current trends, contrasting skeuomorphic and flat design philosophies, and reflects on why many designers overlook or undervalue this technique.

title: Canada losing top talent as workers head to the U.S.
content: Canada is losing highly skilled workers to the United States, resulting in a brain drain that threatens the country’s economic competitiveness.  The migration trend is driven by better opportunities, higher salaries, and stronger job markets in the U.S., leaving Canada short of talent in technology, finance, and other high-growth sectors.  Policymakers and businesses are urged to implement strategies such as improved incentives, immigration reforms, and investment in education to retain and attract talent.

title: 戒色但不禁欲，情趣用品被年轻人买爆了 | 原文
content: The piece discusses how, during economic downturns, condom sales rise—a phenomenon called the "condom paradox." Studies show that reduced leisure travel and increased time at home boost sexual activity, leading to higher demand for condoms. Historical examples include the U.S. Great Depression and the 2008 global crisis, where condom production and sales spiked. The article highlights broader trends in youth behavior, such as growing use of intimate products, amidst contemporary socio‑economic challenges.

title: AI大厂，穷得只剩利润 | 原文
content: Google’s strong Q4 earnings are largely driven by valuation gains of its portfolio companies, not cash inflows. Of its $62.6 billion net profit, $36.9 billion came from increased equity values, with $28.7 billion attributed to Anthropic’s rise. Nearly 60 % of the reported profit reflects book gains; no actual revenue entered Google’s accounts. This highlights how IPO and investment valuation hikes inflate earnings under current accounting rules.

title: 2026 05 26 HackerNews
content: In May 2026 Hacker News highlighted AI ethics, search‑engine changes, and tech policy. Pope Leo XIV urged AI serve all people, not elites, and called for regulation. Google’s AI‑driven search sparked backlash, prompting users to switch to privacy‑focused alternatives like Kagi and DuckDuckGo. Discussions covered migrating from Go to Rust, Jira’s theoretical Turing‑completeness, creative uses of AI, and the impact of AI on coding quality and workplace practices. The posts collectively debated responsible technology use and its societal effects.

title: 古尔曼：苹果 WWDC 将成库克「绝唱」，董事长身份不再发表主题演讲
content: Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman reports that Tim Cook’s keynote at WWDC on June 8 will be the final major event he hosts as Apple’s CEO. Starting September 1, John Tennes will take over as CEO, and Cook will become executive chairman without speaking at future keynotes. Apple has identified the launch of a foldable‑screen iPhone as a priority under Tennes’s leadership.

title: 华为正式发表半导体领域新定律
content: Huawei announced the “τ Law” at the 2026 International Circuits and Systems Conference in Shanghai. It marks China’s first industry‑wide principle for semiconductor development. Following this law, Huawei has designed and mass‑produced 381 chip variants over the past six years, and will introduce a new Kirin phone processor using logic‑folding technology in the fall to boost performance.

title: 上纬新材完成工商变更，「稚晖君」彭志辉正式出任董事长
content: In late 2025, Zhiyuan Robotics acquired majority control of Shangwei New Materials through a combination of agreement transfer and partial tender offer. In 2026, Shangwei completed its corporate restructuring, and Zhiyuan co‑founder Peng Zhi‑hui (Zhi Hui Jun) became chairman, while Tian Hua remained legal representative and CEO. The company adopted a dual‑focus strategy on green advanced materials and embodied intelligence, launching the global first small‑size full‑body‑control humanoid robot Q1. Shangwei, a leader in high‑end specialty resins, is positioned to accelerate product development and deployment with Zhiyuan’s robotics research.

title: 宇树科技：第一季度扣非净利润同比下降 52.55% 至 4025.36 万元
content: Yu Shù Technology reported that for Q1 2026, operating revenue was 423 million yuan, a 68.49% year‑on‑year increase. However, higher research, development, and sales expenses caused net profit after non‑recurring items to fall to 40.25 million yuan, a 52.55% decline from the same period last year.

title: 星巴克在国内首次跨界卖衣服：马甲 399 元、T 恤 279 元
content: Starbucks began selling apparel in China on May 26, offering “Bear Manager Small Town” items such as vests, embroidered T‑shirts, and hoodies priced between ¥279 and ¥459. Products can be ordered online via a mini‑program for in‑store pickup, and the sale ends when stock runs out. The move expands revenue beyond coffee, aiming to boost per‑store profits amid intense domestic competition and slowing average spend per customer. Starbucks is also transitioning to a light‑asset franchising model and plans to grow to 20 000 stores.

title: 谷歌重拳治理「AI 投毒」：GEO 垃圾内容将遭降权与移除
content: In mid‑May, Google introduced new guidelines for generative‑search optimization (GEO) to counter “AI poisoning,” where advertisers create false marketing narratives that trick large language models into presenting misinformation as facts. Google will penalise, remove, and ban such “junk content” across the web. Critics say the approach only addresses symptoms, citing hidden content feeding, constant attack‑defense cycles, and blurred lines between semantics and facts. Future SEO will focus on proving content credibility, requiring search engines to balance model flexibility with source purity.

title: 谷歌 CEO 最新访谈：谷歌多模态能力领先，但 Coding 确实落后了
content: Sundar Pichai says Google’s models lead in text, multimodal, speech, and general reasoning, but lag in agent‑based coding, instruction following, and long‑term tasks. The new Gemini 3.5 Flash has artifacts and performance issues, to be fixed quickly, with usage limits loosened over time. Google will not shift search entirely to AI, keeping sources and links, and will use a subscription‑plus‑ad revenue model. The Spark agent launches summer 2024 with phased rollout for trust and safety. Google also opens TPU hardware to competitors to stay ahead and reduce costs, noting AGI is inevitable and societal preparation is needed.

title: 马斯克：Grok 基础模型 V9-Medium（1.5T）已完成训练
content: Elon Musk announced that Grok V9‑Medium, a 1.5 trillion‑parameter foundational model, has finished training and performed well in evaluations. The training pipeline incorporated extensive Cursor data and will continue to add more. Fine‑tuning is underway, and reinforcement learning is set to launch in a few days. Musk expects the model to be released in two to three weeks.

title: 脉脉创始人兼 CEO：具身智能岗位平均月薪约 6.2 万元
content: Embodied AI is a new talent hotspot. From January to April 2026, job postings in the field grew 15‑fold, with an average monthly salary of about 62,000 yuan. In the same period, new‑economy roles expanded 22.6 %, AI positions increased 8.7‑fold, and AI’s share of all new roles rose from 2.78 % to 22.03 %. Although funding is strong, embodied‑AI firms cannot match large‑model companies in pay, because those companies invest heavily in compute and attract top researchers who can generate billions in value. Fear of missing out is driving tech firms to accelerate their embodied‑AI initiatives.

title: 你觉得，每个人都是一张白纸来到世界的吗？Nature子刊最新：负责记忆的海马体在出生时写满“草稿”，之后不断“优化”，成为现在的你 | 原文
content: Nature’s new study shows that the hippocampus is not blank at birth. Instead, it is filled with a “draft” of memories that are continuously refined throughout childhood. This progressive optimization explains why early memories are sparse and vague while later ones can be recalled with clarity. The research also explores how infant brains initially mix similar events but later develop the ability to distinguish between experiences, shedding light on the brain’s early learning process.

title: vibe coding 了一个调用本地 TTS 服务的文字转语音工具
content: MOSS‑TTS‑Nano is a lightweight, open‑source multilingual text‑to‑speech model (~0.1 B parameters) designed for real‑time, CPU‑only inference. It runs locally, so no data leaves the network. The web tool supports 29 preset voices covering over 10 languages and accents and outputs high‑quality 48 kHz WAV files with metadata. Users can input text, pick a voice, generate speech, and then listen or download the audio directly from the browser.

title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with Git and GitHub in VS Code
content: This article explains how to use Visual Studio Code to work with Git and GitHub. It covers initializing a repository, creating and renaming branches, staging, committing, and pushing changes—all within the editor. It shows how to view diffs, merge branches, publish a project to GitHub, and clone existing repositories. The piece also introduces the Model Context Protocol extension for AI-assisted coding through Copilot. The guide focuses on practical, everyday tasks for beginners.
